title: UAE mulls freezing Iranian assets as Middle East conflict escalates: WSJ
summary_full: The UAE is considering freezing billions of dollars of Iranian assets held in the Gulf state, potentially severing one of Tehran's most critical economic lifelines.
summary_public: The UAE is considering freezing billions of dollars of Iranian assets held in the Gulf state, potentially severing one of Tehran's most critical economic lifelines.

IR.label: negative
